label: juggle_stageA_bounce
stage: A (bounce mastery — gates and windows deliberately IGNORED)
note: SUSTAINED HARD VERTICAL BOUNCING. ball_y_pos lands 4 consecutive qualifying bounces with NO decay (vz 3.75/3.62/3.27/3.92 — the last is the strongest) and every single contact qualifies. Compare the raw-25 champion, whose bounce chain decays 4.18/4.05/1.79/0.50/negative. Verticality 0.95-1.00, zero crashes. Root cause fixed was an ALTITUDE RATCHET: the drone climbed 1.34->2.66m chasing the ball and never descended, because the between-bounce hold was anchored to the last hit height AND the punch drove the drone itself to +1.89m/s which a 0.88*hover floor could only arrest in 1.6s while the ball returned in 0.64s. Added an absolute base height plus a hard ARREST phase. edge_crosswind_a is included as the CURRENT FAILURE MODE: one perfect 5.43 m/s strike (above the ~5.2 needed to clear a lintel) then the crosswind carries the ball laterally out of reach and it is never touched again — a lost-ball failure, not a dribble. Next: lateral pursuit.
